_comment: Codex CLI hooks for the unified agent-state watch. Drop as <cwd>/.codex/hooks.json (project) or merge into ~/.codex/hooks.json. Replace ABS with the absolute path to agent-watch/hooks/emit-from-stdin.sh. The agent must be launched with env AGENT_WATCH_SESSION=<tmux session>. STATE is the command arg (no JSON parsing). PermissionRequest=WAITING covers tool-approval; free-form asks are not covered (screen-scrape fallback handles that gap).
